cpu: AMD A8-3850 APU with Radeon HD Graphics
notes: While the game *runs* perfectly fine on the Linux/SteamOS platforms, the game itself has an unsolved gameplay bug, which makes playing impossible. Has nothing to do with the Linux/SteamOS Proton/WINE version. The developers abandoned the game, while they are still selling it on Steam. See Steam forum.
title: Ancient Warlords: Aequilibrium

notes: Game starts and runs. No proton issues
